Aleksandar Pavlovic.summary: Aleksandar Pavlović is a Germany defensive midfielder from Bayern Munich who gives the national team press resistance, calm distribution, and midfield screening.
Aleksandar Pavlovic.note: Germany's young midfield stabilizer, useful for receiving under pressure and keeping the build-up calm.
Aleksandar Pavlovic.noteZh: 亚历山大·帕夫洛维奇是德国年轻的中场稳定器，能在压力下接球，并让组织推进保持冷静。

Alexander Nübel.note: Germany's goalkeeper depth, giving them a modern sweeper option and reliable shot-stopping behind the starters.
Alexander Nübel.noteZh: 亚历山大·努贝尔是德国门将深度，能在主力身后提供现代清道夫门将选择和可靠扑救。

Angelo Stiller.note: Germany's left-footed rhythm player, able to slow the game down and pick cleaner passes from deep.
Angelo Stiller.noteZh: 安杰洛·施蒂勒是德国左脚节奏点，能放慢比赛，并从较深位置选择更干净的传球。

Antonio Rüdiger.note: Germany's defensive enforcer, trusted to defend big spaces, attack duels, and bring edge to the back line.
Antonio Rüdiger.noteZh: 安东尼奥·吕迪格是德国防线强硬点，能防守大片空间、主动进入对抗，并给后防增加锋芒。

Assan Ouedraogo.note: Germany's young midfield power runner, useful when they need carries, late surges, and fresh legs through the middle.
Assan Ouedraogo.noteZh: 阿桑·韦德拉奥戈是德国年轻的中场力量跑动点，在球队需要带球、后插上和中路新鲜腿脚时很有用。

David Raum.note: Germany's left-side width provider, stretching the flank with overlaps and serving repeated crosses into the area.
David Raum.noteZh: 大卫·劳姆是德国左路宽度来源，能用套边拉开边路，并持续把传中送入禁区。

Deniz Undav.note: Germany's compact forward finisher, sharp around loose balls and clever enough to combine near the box.
Deniz Undav.noteZh: 德尼兹·翁达夫是德国紧凑型终结前锋，善于抓住松散球权，也能在禁区附近聪明配合。

Felix Nmecha.note: Germany's rangy midfield runner, adding carries, physical duels, and arrivals beyond the first wave.
Felix Nmecha.noteZh: 费利克斯·恩梅查是德国覆盖范围大的中场跑动点，能带球、对抗，并在第一波进攻后继续前插。

Florian Wirtz.note: Germany's main creative lock-picker, dangerous when he receives between lines and releases runners early.
Florian Wirtz.noteZh: 弗洛里安·维尔茨是德国主要的破密集创造者，在线间接球并提前释放跑动队友时最危险。

Jamal Musiala.note: Germany's slalom dribbler, able to slip through crowded midfield zones and turn half-openings into shots.
Jamal Musiala.noteZh: 贾马尔·穆西亚拉是德国的蛇形盘带手，能穿过拥挤中场区域，并把半机会变成射门。

Jamie Leweling.note: Germany's direct wide runner, useful for stretching tired full-backs and giving transitions more speed.
Jamie Leweling.noteZh: 杰米·勒韦林是德国直接型边路跑动点，能拉扯疲劳的边后卫，并让转换进攻更有速度。

Jonathan Tah.note: Germany's commanding centre-back, giving them size, calm clearances, and organization when pressure builds.
Jonathan Tah.noteZh: 约纳坦·塔是德国指挥型中卫，能在压力上升时提供身材、冷静解围和防线组织。

Joshua Kimmich.note: Germany's tactical reference point, important for tempo, set pieces, and deciding when the team presses.
Joshua Kimmich.noteZh: 约书亚·基米希是德国战术参照点，对节奏、定位球和球队何时压迫的判断都很重要。

Kai Havertz.note: Germany's hybrid forward, linking play as a false nine and arriving late to attack crosses or cutbacks.
Kai Havertz.noteZh: 凯·哈弗茨是德国混合型前锋，能像伪九号一样串联，并后插上攻击传中或倒三角。

Leon Goretzka.note: Germany's power midfielder, bringing late box arrivals, defensive duels, and extra force in transition.
Leon Goretzka.noteZh: 莱昂·格雷茨卡是德国力量型中场，能带来后插上、防守对抗和转换中的额外冲击。

Leroy Sane.note: Germany's explosive winger, most dangerous when he can run at space and cut inside onto his left foot.
Leroy Sane.noteZh: 勒罗伊·萨内是德国爆发型边锋，在能冲向空间并内切到左脚时最有威胁。

Malick Thiaw.note: Germany's athletic centre-back option, useful for aerial defending and recovering when the line plays high.
Malick Thiaw.noteZh: 马利克·佳夫是德国运动能力强的中卫选择，适合空中防守和高位防线后的回追。

Manuel Neuer.note: Germany's legendary goalkeeper, still valuable for sweeping high, organizing calmly, and starting attacks quickly.
Manuel Neuer.noteZh: 曼努埃尔·诺伊尔是德国传奇门将，依然能高位清扫、冷静组织，并快速发起进攻。

Maximilian Beier.note: Germany's fast striker option, giving them channel runs and a different finishing rhythm behind Havertz.
Maximilian Beier.noteZh: 马克西米利安·拜尔是德国速度型前锋选择，能提供通道跑动，并在哈弗茨身后带来不同终结节奏。

Nadiem Amiri.note: Germany's creative midfield connector, useful for restarts, short combinations, and energetic counter-pressure.
Nadiem Amiri.noteZh: 纳迪姆·阿米里是德国创造型中场连接点，能处理定位球、短传配合，并积极反抢。

Nathaniel Brown.note: Germany's young left-back spark, offering forward support, quick recovery, and a fresher flank profile.
Nathaniel Brown.noteZh: 纳撒尼尔·布朗是德国年轻左后卫火花，能提供前插支援、快速回追和更有活力的边路选择。

Nick Woltemade.note: Germany's tall forward connector, unusual because he can cushion passes, combine, and still finish in the box.
Nick Woltemade.noteZh: 尼克·沃尔特马德是德国高大型前场连接点，特别之处在于能柔和停球、参与配合，同时在禁区终结。

Nico Schlotterbeck.note: Germany's left-footed centre-back, valuable for stepping forward and passing through the first press.
Nico Schlotterbeck.noteZh: 尼科·施洛特贝克是德国左脚中卫，对前顶防守和穿过第一道压迫的传球很有价值。

Oliver Baumann.note: Germany's steady goalkeeper option, trusted for reliable saves and clear communication with the back line.
Oliver Baumann.noteZh: 奥利弗·鲍曼是德国稳健门将选择，可靠扑救和与防线清晰沟通都值得信任。

Pascal Groß.summary: Pascal Groß is a Germany central midfielder from Brighton & Hove Albion who adds passing range, set-piece quality, and veteran control.
Pascal Groß.note: Germany's veteran passer, useful for set pieces, switches of play, and calming possession late.
Pascal Groß.noteZh: 帕斯卡尔·格罗斯是德国老练传球手，能处理定位球、转移球，并在后段让控球冷静下来。

Waldemar Anton.note: Germany's versatile defender, able to cover centre-back or right-back and keep duels competitive.
Waldemar Anton.noteZh: 瓦尔德马尔·安东是德国多面防守者，能覆盖中卫或右后卫，并保持对抗强度。
